MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-14-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Order to show cause to defendant's counsel, Arlo G. Uriarte, for failure to comply with San Francisco Superior Court Early Settlement Program Policies and Procedures No. 4 (Administrative Fee) is heard this day. The OSC is ordered off calendar and dissolved for good cause. Proceedings not reported. (212)

MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-09-2009 Continued To Jan-14-10 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Order to Show Cause to Plaintiff's Counsel and Defendants' Counsel Arlo G. Uriarte and Robert Cervantes for failure to comply with San Francisco Superior Court Early Settlement Program Policies and Procedures No. 4. (Administrative fee) is heard this day. Court ordered OSC to Plaintiff's Counsel and Defendant's Counsel Robert Cervantes only off calendar and dissolved/good cause. Defendant's Counsel Arlo G. Uriarte is sanctioned $100.00, for failure to appear. The OSC to Defendant's Counsel Arlo G. Uriarte only is re-set to 1/14/2010 at 10:30 AM, in Department 212. Proceedings not reported. (212)
